asset.title: Startup Diligence Live Join
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The video successfully demonstrates multi-user collaboration in a NodeRoom workspace. It shows a user creating a room, sharing a code, and two other users joining and interacting in real-time with visible trace updates.

featureClarity.evidence: The flow clearly shows how multiple users join a shared room using a unique code.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Demonstrates the complete sequence from room creation to multiple users joining and chatting.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode interface with smooth transitions and helpful zoom-ins on key UI elements.

consistency.evidence: Perfectly aligns with the NodeRoom concept of shared workspaces, live traces, and collaborative chat.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Shows real UI interactions, live trace updates, and actual text input rather than static mockups.

legibility.evidence: Text and UI elements are highly readable, aided by selective zooming on the room code.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for finance and diligence teams needing real-time collaborative analysis.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the joining process and immediate state synchronization across sessions.

observedEvidence: Priya joining via code and sending a chat message
Real-time updates in the Room Trace log
judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: See how teams collaborate in real-time within NodeRoom: create a room, share the secure code, and instantly sync research, chat, and agent traces.
